# Datacendia -- The Defensible AI Platform

> **Datacendia is the only AI platform where every decision is auditable, explainable, and court-admissible.** Multiple AI agents deliberate -- argue, dissent, and challenge each other -- then every decision is recorded in a cryptographically signed, immutable evidence packet. Open-core. Sovereign-first. Self-hosted or cloud.

## Category: Defensible AI

Datacendia created the Defensible AI category. When regulators, auditors, or courts ask "how did your AI make this decision?" -- Datacendia users produce a signed evidence packet. Everyone else has nothing.

The platform replaces unstructured decision-making (email chains, meetings, hallway conversations) with AI-governed multi-agent deliberation. Multiple AI agents with distinct C-Suite mandates (CFO, CLO, CISO, CTO, CRO, Ethics, etc.) debate decisions from different perspectives, then produce a tamper-proof, court-admissible record proving how and why the decision was made.

## What Makes Datacendia Different

1. **Multi-Agent Adversarial Deliberation** -- Multiple AI agents argue with each other. Not one model giving one answer. Built-in devil's advocate, cross-examination, and formal dissent.
2. **Cryptographic Proof** -- Merkle trees, post-quantum KMS (Dilithium, SPHINCS+, Falcon), hardware TPM attestation. Every decision is signed with customer-owned keys.
3. **DCII Framework** -- Decision Crisis Immunization Infrastructure. 9 primitives that make organizations structurally immune to decision crises: Discovery-Time Proof, Deliberation Capture, Override Accountability, Continuity Memory, Drift Detection, Cognitive Bias Mitigation, Quantum-Resistant Integrity, Synthetic Media Authentication, Cross-Jurisdiction Compliance.
4. **Sovereign-First** -- Runs on Ollama locally. Air-gap deployable. No cloud dependency required. Your data never leaves your infrastructure.
5. **Open-Core** -- Free Community Edition (Apache 2.0) on GitHub. Paid tiers for enterprise features.

## Pricing

- **Community**: Free forever (Apache 2.0, self-hosted)
- **Foundation**: $499/month ($4,990/year) -- 8 pillars, ~60 pages: Council, DECIDE, DCII, Gateway, Pulse, Bridge, Graph, Compliance Readiness
- **Enterprise**: $1,499/month ($14,990/year) -- adds CendiaCrucible adversarial testing, +8 advanced intelligence tools (Lens, AuditProvenance, Regulatory, Orbit, Consensus, What-If, Synthesis, RDP), 4 compliance services, governance, sovereign (18 routes), Crown Jewels dashboards (Echo, RedTeam, Gnosis), 19 co-pilots, SSO/CAC/PIV, ZKP/Escrow
- **Strategic**: Custom pricing -- nation-scale, all 12 pillars, 26 industry verticals, white-glove support

3-year commitment saves 20%. Cancel anytime on monthly plans. Secure payment via Stripe.

## Core Products

- **The Council**: Multi-agent AI deliberation engine. C-Suite agents across multiple mandates, 35+ deliberation modes, War Room, Quick Brief, Governed Deliberation.
- **CendiaChronos**: Enterprise Time Machine -- replay past decisions, simulate future crisis scenarios.
- **Ghost Board**: Rehearse high-stakes board meetings against AI directors.
- **CendiaPreMortem**: AI analyzes why your decision will fail before you execute it.
- **Decision Debt**: Real-time dashboard of stuck decisions and the financial cost of delay.
- **CendiaGateway**: AI governance proxy with browser extensions -- control what AI sees and does.
- **CendiaPulse**: System health & decision monitoring -- real-time alerts and metrics.
- **CendiaBridge**: Workflow automation, approvals, and integrations.
- **Knowledge Graph**: Entity lineage explorer -- relationships between decisions, agents, and evidence.
- **Compliance Readiness**: Basic compliance checklist, framework status tracking (GDPR, HIPAA, SOC 2, EU AI Act, ISO 27001).
- **CendiaCrucible**: Adversarial stress testing -- Monte Carlo red-teaming of decisions (Enterprise).
- **CendiaLens**: AI explainability dashboard -- see why every decision was made (Enterprise).
- **CendiaDCII**: Decision Crisis Immunization Infrastructure -- IISS scoring, 9 primitives, Regulator's Receipt.
- **CendiaVault**: Immutable evidence storage with Merkle tree integrity.
- **CendiaNotary**: Cryptographic signing authority with customer-owned keys.
- **Crown Jewels**: CendiaEcho, CendiaRedTeam, CendiaGnosis -- premium executive dashboards (Enterprise).
- **CendiaOversight**: Real-time regulatory radar -- FDA, GDPR, DORA, EU AI Act frameworks.

## Industry Verticals

Legal, Healthcare (HIPAA), Financial Services (Basel III), Government/Defense (FedRAMP, air-gap), Insurance, Pharmaceutical, Manufacturing, Energy, Technology/SaaS, Retail, Real Estate, Transportation, Media, Professional Services, Higher Education, Sports Governance (FIFA/UEFA), Smart City, EU Banking, and more. See verticals page for full list.

## Technology Stack

TypeScript, React 18, Express, PostgreSQL, Redis, Neo4j, Ollama (local LLM), Docker, Kubernetes, Helm. NVIDIA Inception Program member.

## Deployment Options

- **Self-hosted**: Docker Compose or Kubernetes (Helm chart provided)
- **Private Cloud**: AWS, Azure, GCP with customer-managed keys
- **Air-Gapped**: Zero external dependencies, bootable USB option

## Open Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/datacendia
- DDGI Framework: https://github.com/datacendia/decision-governance-infrastructure
- License: Apache 2.0 (Community Edition)
